notes: tested single player and multi player. game is smooth, but menus are glitched. can not be minimized in game.
title: Worms Armageddon

notes:
Elect to install tweaks on the first run - W:A will not run without them. 

The main menu appears in a window, which is cut off at the top and cannot be moved without breaking the view. To solve this, install SuperFrontendHD.
title: Worms Armageddon

gpu: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050 Ti with Max-Q Design
notes: Game starts with "W:A" warnings as noted by other users.  Window shows a black screen with exception to mouse cursor.  Audio runs fine, and menu seems to load based on audio feedback.
title: Worms Armageddon

notes:
Gameplay is fine with no issues, but the main menu is fixed in the top-left corner of the screen, and mouse tracking in the menu is inaccurate. This is not a major deal, given that menus were already borked on Windows to begin with. 

Leave DirectDraw enabled, as switching to D3D-based renderers will outright break the menu, leaving you with a blank screen.
title: Worms Armageddon
